title.en: In this way, Ye Tian's strength naturally impro...

content.en:
After the Origin Rule of the Other Shore reached the ninety percent realm, Ye Tian's strength soared.

In the years that followed, he began to work hard to create more top-notch Beyond Supreme Arts, so that he could improve his strength.

After a period of time, Ye Tian perfected the Supreme Technique of the Other Shore without Breaking the Golden Cover Technique to the top of the Supreme Technique of the Other Shore, and his power increased greatly.

In the same way, he has also perfected the Beyond Shore Supreme Technique into a top-notch Beyond Shore Technique.

In this way, Ye Tian's strength naturally improved a little.

However, if he wants to raise the Origin Rule of the Other Shore from the Ninety Percent Realm to the Ninety Percent Realm, it is a bit difficult for him even now, and it will take a long time to hope for a breakthrough.

"If I can obtain the Origin Golden Leaf of the Other Shore again, I may be able to raise the Origin Rules of the Other Shore to the realm of ninety percent one earlier!" Ye Tian said darkly.

But it's a pity that this kind of Origin Gold Leaf on the other side is too precious, and he still became the owner of the sub-island before he was eligible to get a piece as a reward.

Stormtooth Island will not give him a second piece, unless he has made a great contribution to Windtooth Island or has too much seniority, so he can hope to get another piece as a reward.

"Or maybe I'll take some treasures that are conducive to the Origin Upper Realm to improve my strength, and exchange them for another Origin Gold Leaf from the Lord of the Wind Fang!"

Ye Tian felt that this possibility was still there.

At this time, he thought of the ruin god gold.

Ruin God Gold can not only be used to build the Eternal Ruin God Array, but also to upgrade the Arcana on the other side.

The inferior Treasure of the Other Shore can be upgraded to a medium Treasure of the Other Shore with tens of thousands of Ruin Divine Gold, and the value of the Ruins Divine Gold is still very high.

It's just that he has too much ruin god gold, and he has built the Eternal Ruin God Array again and again, and he doesn't care about the ruin god gold at all, and uses it wildly, so he feels that the ruin god gold is not of high value.

And even if some of the Origin Upper Realm obtains the treasure of the other side, it is estimated that it is only an inferior treasure of the other side, and it must need the ruin god gold.

"Then exchange the ruin god gold for a piece of the other side's origin gold leaf!"

Ye Tian decided.

Subsequently.

He contacted the Lord of the Ice Rain he knew best.

......

The palace of the Lord of Ice and Rain.

Ye Tian came to visit the Lord of Ice and Rain.

"Lord of Ice and Rain!"

Ye Tian said respectfully.

"Lord of Endless, what are you looking for me?" asked the Lord of Ice and Rain.

At this time, Ye Tian directly expressed his intention.

"Lord of Ice and Rain, can I exchange some Ruin God Gold for a piece of Origin Gold Leaf on the other side?"

Exchange the ruin god gold for the other side of the origin gold leaf?

The Lord of Ice and Rain frowned slightly: "Endless Lord, the Origin Golden Leaf on the other side is very rare, it will take a long time for the Origin Golden Tree on the other side to be born, if there are enough Island Owners, it may not be enough." Although the ruin god gold is very precious, this rule is not easy to break!"

Once the rules are broken, the other island owners also want to exchange for the Origin Gold Leaf on the other side, so how can Fengya Island get it?

Ye Tiandao: "Lord of Ice and Rain, the rules are indeed difficult to break, but other Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors can't take out the amount of Ruin God Gold I gave." Can you discuss with the Lord of the Wind Fangs how much Ruin God Gold is needed for a piece of Origin Gold Leaf on the other side? Just name a number, and I'll take it out. "

The Lord of Ice and Rain knew that Ye Tian had a lot of Ruin God Gold, and this was definitely not bragging.

So, she said, "Okay, I'll talk to them!"

Subsequently.

Ye Tian returned to the Endless Island, and the Lord of Ice and Rain contacted the Lord of the Wind Fang to discuss the matter.

meeting.

The Lord of the Cave Xuan said: "The Lord of Ice and Rain, the Lord of Endless wants the Origin Golden Leaf on the other side, this is not in accordance with the rules!"

The Lord of Wind Teeth also frowned slightly: "It's indeed not in accordance with the rules. "

The Lord of Ice and Rain said Ye Tian's request: "The Lord of Endless said that he is willing to take out the amount of Ruin God Gold that satisfies us, we can say a number at will!"

The Lord of Qin Yin was surprised: "The Lord of Endless has so much ruin god gold?"

The Lord of Ice and Rain said: "He really has a lot of Ruin God Gold, anyway, he often builds the Eternal Ruin God Array!"

The Lord of the Wind Tooth said: "The Ruin God Gold is really useful to us, my Treasure on the other side is still inferior, if there is enough Ruin God Gold, you can upgrade my Treasure on the other side." "

"Does the Lord of the Windfang mean to agree to the Endless Lord's request?" asked the Lord of Ice and Rain.

The Lord of Wind Teeth was silent for a while, "If he can come up with 300,000 pieces of Ruin God Gold, then agree, everyone can upgrade their other Shore Treasure!"

"300,000 pieces of ruin god gold, isn't this too exaggerated?"

The Lord of the Sound of the Piano exclaimed.

"The Endless Lord let us say a random number, if he can't do it, then he won't be able to obtain the Origin Gold Leaf on the other side. Besides, we must raise the requirements a bit, otherwise the other island owners will use this as an excuse to exchange the Origin Gold Leaf on the other side. The Lord of the Wind Teeth said.

The Lord of the Cave also agreed.

In this way, the four Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors settled this matter.

Subsequently.

The Lord of Ice and Rain has gone to restore Ye Tian.

......

"300,000 ruin god gold!"

This amount is indeed terrifying, and its total value is far more than a piece of Origin Gold Leaf on the other side.

However, he needed the Origin Gold Leaf of the Other Shore right now.

But Ye Tian didn't have 300,000 pieces of ruin god gold now, he only had 200,000 yuan now.

So, Ye Tian asked the Lord of Ice and Rain to wait for a few days, and he needed to collect the Ruin God Gold.

That's it.

In the following days, Ye Tian searched for the Ruin God Gold in many places in the Innocent Abyss to gather the Ruin God Gold he needed.

The years passed.

One primeval epoch after another has passed.

this day.

Ye Tian successfully gathered 300,000 pieces of ruin god gold, so he took 300,000 pieces of ruin god gold to find the Lord of Ice and Rain.

"Lord of Infinity, you have collected 300,000 pieces of Ruin God Gold so quickly!"

The Lord of Ice and Rain wondered if Ye Tian had found a super-large ruin god gold vein and had been mining there!

Soon.

The Lord of Ice and Rain took a piece of the Origin Golden Leaf from the other side and handed it to Ye Tian.

Ye Tian also dedicated 300,000 pieces of ruin god gold to Fengya Island.

After obtaining the Origin Golden Leaf on the other side, Ye Tian went back to continue his retreat and cultivation.

Of course.

He didn't use the Origin Gold Leaf of the Other Shore immediately, he was about to break through to the Origin Rule of the Ninety Percent One Shore and fell into a bottleneck, and then use the Origin Gold Leaf of the Other Shore, so as to break the shackles in one fell swoop and break through to the realm of the Origin Rule of the Ninety Percent and One Shore.

Time passed, and 100,000 primeval years passed.

At this time, Ye Tian's other side origin rule entered a bottleneck again.

Then.

Ye Tian built an Eternal Ruins Divine Array, entered it to retreat and cultivate, and took out the Origin Golden Leaf on the other side, and began to impact the Ninety Percent One Origin Rule on the other side.
